title: Craftable Spawn Eggs
description: A mod that adds crafting recipes for eggs of the 4 basic mobs.
body:
A mod that adds crafting recipes for the following mobs:
- Zombie | _Rotten Flesh_
- Skeleton | _Bone_
- Spider | _Spider Eye_
- Creeper | _Gunpowder_

Each recipe uses the item that corresponds to that mob.
Here is the recipe that every spawn egg follows:

![Crafting Recipe for the Zombie Spawn Egg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74d7ae486b4591144c37b5731a8205a3d08f26f5.png)
